summary: Tested blank health tab bug fix and unified pet page with all 14 pillar routes. All features verified working: Unified pet page loads correctly with all tabs (overview, health, vaccines, personality, pillars, identity), tab navigation updates URL correctly, and all pillar routes show Coming Soon pages.

details: Page loads with pet info (name, breed, species, gender)
Pet Soul Growing section with completion percentage
All 14 Life Pillars displayed in grid
Quick Questions and Full Journey buttons work
Active Medications section displays correctly
Shows medication name, dosage, and frequency
Open Full Health Vault button present
Vaccines Due Soon alert displays correctly
Vaccination Records section shows all vaccines
Shows given date and next due date
Manage in Health Vault button present

features_verified.feature: Unified Pet Page - Pet Soul Tab
details: Pet Soul Journey component loads correctly
Shows personality description
Displays completion percentage
Categories: Identity & Temperament, Family & Pack, Rhythm & Routine, Home Comforts
All 14 pillar cards displayed
Each pillar shows name and description
Links include pet ID as query parameter

features_verified.feature: Unified Pet Page - Pet Pass Tab
details: Pet Pass card displays correctly
Shows pet photo, name, and pass number
Status badge (TRIAL/PENDING) visible
Clicking tabs updates URL with correct tab parameter
Health → tab=health
Vaccines → tab=vaccines
Pet Soul → tab=personality
Services → tab=pillars
Pet Pass → tab=identity

critical_code_review_comments: UnifiedPetPage.jsx: Well-structured component with proper tab handling via URL query params
App.js: All 14 pillar routes correctly defined using PillarPage component
MyPets.jsx: Pillar links correctly configured with pet ID query parameter
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blank health tab bug fixed. UnifiedPetPage.jsx handles /pet/:petId route with tab query parameter support. All 14 pillar routes (groom, feed, play, train, insure, adopt, farewell, community) show Coming Soon pages via PillarPage component.
